---
name: frontend
description: Instructions on how to call multiple LLMs for frontend work.
agent: Atlas
---

Call Frontend-Engineer-subagent-Gemini.agent.md, Frontend-Engineer-subagent-GPT.agent.md, Frontend-Engineer-subagent-Opus.agent.md in parallel as subagents for seperate versions of the task given below. Each subagent must generate seperate files for their version of the task.
